label: three_stage/BuildSystem/trial_02/repeat_02
governance_notes: Parent global vars 'builds' (read_write) and 'artifacts' (read_write) are conserved: 'builds' read is covered by CheckConcurrentBuild, GetBuildStatus, ListBuilds, ExecuteBuildSteps, CancelBuild; 'builds' write is covered by CreateBuildRecord, ExecuteBuildSteps, CancelBuild; 'artifacts' write is covered by StoreArtifacts. No child requires 'artifacts' read per parent requirements. All children's global_vars are subsets of parent's global_vars.
